name: standards fetcher: every fetch records fetched_at as ISO-8601 UTC (Z-suffix) for §2.21 source header
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id src-1 --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --cache "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache" --emit-metadata "$PWD/meta.json" && grep -E "fetched_at.*20[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T.*Z" meta.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
